component.name: OrbitDeck
component.summary: Satellite tracking and orbital analysis for amateur radio

description.p: OrbitDeck is a desktop application for satellite tracking and orbital analysis, built for amateur-radio operators who work the birds. It is tracking and analysis only; radio (CAT) and rotator control are out of scope.

It includes live look angles, sky and ground tracks, pass prediction, Doppler and link-budget tools, an interactive OSCARLOCATOR, illumination and mutual-window analysis, a printable PDF OSCARLOCATOR generator, and a built-in classroom of orbital-mechanics explainers.
